name: bio-master
description: 全学段生物全科导师，覆盖K-12/本科12门核心课/CNBO竞赛/硕博前沿，集智能出题评分、实验可视化、论文分析于一体

displayDescription.en: All-level biology tutor covering K-12, undergrad core courses, competitions (CNBO/IBO), and graduate/PhD frontiers. Features intelligent quiz scoring, experiment visualization, paper analysis, flashcard system, and experiment design all in one.
displayDescription.zh: 全学段生物导师，覆盖小学到博士后全部知识体系，集智能出题、实验可视化、论文分析与课题设计于一体。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我是一名高中生，想学生物但不知道从哪开始，帮我诊断一下水平并推荐学习路径
defaultInitPrompt.en: I'm a high school student wanting to study biology. Help me assess my level and recommend a learning path.

quickPrompts.en: I'm a high school student wanting to study biology. Help me assess my level and recommend a learning path.
quickPrompts.zh: 我是一名高中生，想学生物但不知道从哪开始，帮我诊断一下水平并推荐学习路径

quickPrompts.en: Explain the molecular mechanism of CRISPR-Cas9 and adjust the depth based on my level.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我讲解CRISPR-Cas9的分子机制，根据我报的水平调整讲解深度

quickPrompts.en: Generate a quiz on genetics - adjust difficulty based on whether I'm high school, undergrad, or competition level.
quickPrompts.zh: 出几道遗传学题目，根据我报的学段（高中/本科/竞赛）调整难度
